reviews.comment:
Ayer 10/12/24 volviendo de Chile cargamos combustible, no tenían internet, esperamos hicimos transferencia y el tipo que nos atendió no nos cargó los puntos. Desastre, no es la primera vez, estando en el paso fronterizo no pude ser que les falle el internet 🙄 pésimo

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, 10/12/24, returning from Chile, we filled up with fuel. They had no internet. We waited, made a transfer, and the guy who helped us didn't charge our points. Disaster. This isn't the first time. Being at the border crossing, it couldn't be that their internet failed. Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2Z2M3SXpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy inaccesible los precios que tienen, mala atención

(Translated by Google)
Their prices are very inaccessible, and the service is poor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzdV9tam5RRRAB
accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYMTVmTXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion. Gracias al El señor Javier Rolando que trabaja alli, pude recuperar mi toalla que habia dejado olvidada en la habitacion cuando me hospede en el hotel del aca 20 dias antes. Cuando regrese alli le pregunte si la habian visto y me la habia guardado. Un genio!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Thanks to Mr. Javier Rolando, who works there, I was able to retrieve my towel, which I had left in my room when I stayed at the hotel 20 days earlier. When I returned, I asked him if they had seen it, and he had kept it for me. He's a gem!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYM3NDNGN3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I filled up my motorhome and asked the attendant to clean the windshield afterward. I thanked him, but I didn't have small bills for a tip. He made a very strange face, so I parked the motorhome to sleep there. Around 8 pm, I was hit by a rock, and then immediately by another. Who is the suspect?
This is the second time I've filled up there in the last two years. Who would have an interest in causing me panic?
This happened yesterday, September 25, 2024, at 7 pm. Thank you.

(Original)
Abasteci meu motor home e pedi ao frentista limpar o vidro após eu agradeci mas não tinha notas pequenas para propina ele fez uma cara muito estranha, então estacionei o MH para dormir lá para umas 8 pm fui atingido por uma pedrada , logo em seguida por outra , quem é o suspeito ?
E segunda vez que abasteço aí nos últimos 2 anos , quem teria interesse em me por em pânico ?
Isso aconteceu ontem 25/09/24
As 19 pm , obrigado .
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNueGRHOUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Si o si hay que cargar combustible para continuar con el viaje.
Cuenta con cafetería.
El WIFI aveces funciona aveces no.
Son apaticos los atendedores

(Translated by Google)
You absolutely have to refuel to continue your trip.
There's a cafeteria.
The Wi-Fi works intermittently.
The staff are unfriendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuX01QUlV3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The service from the gas station attendants was terrible; they didn't put the mileage on the receipt and they just put the diesel in the tank.

(Original)
O atendimento dos frentista é péssimo, não colocaram o Km na nota e deram o diesel no tanque
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNudE92WFJnEAE

reviews.comment:
La ubicación es estratégica. El hostal está muy bien, teniendo en cuenta las dificultades que tiene la zona.

(Translated by Google)
The location is strategic. The hostel is very good, considering the difficulties in the area.
